backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (footer column removal, Privacy Policy page creation, and routing/footer link addition) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's component and hook purposes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Poppo Live Agency app, setting the page title, meta description, og:site_name, and mounting the React root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing a 'home' or 'privacy' page state, conditionally rendering either the full landing page layout or the PrivacyPolicy component.
frontend/src/components/AppPreviewSectio: App preview section with feature highlights and a 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' CTA plus App Store/Google Play badges, all linking to the invite URL.
Six-card features grid highlighting key Poppo Live capabilities (Go Live, Earn Rewards, Gifts, Voice Calls, PK Battles, Global Community) with gradient icon accents and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simplified footer displaying the brand logo, description, social icons, copyright notice, and a Privacy Policy navigation button, with all link columns removed.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for Poppo Live Agency with a background image, gradient overlays, headline, and CTA buttons for becoming an agent, WhatsApp contact, and app store downloads.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Four-step onboarding section explaining how to download, register, stream, and earn on Poppo Live, displayed in a grid with a connecting line and a CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, smooth-scroll nav links, WhatsApp and Apply Now CTA buttons, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/PrivacyPolicy.ts: Full privacy policy page component covering data collection, usage, sharing, cookies, and retention, with a back-navigation button and a footer with social links.
frontend/src/components/StatsSection.tsx: Community stats section displaying four animated counters (users, countries, streams, creators) that trigger on scroll, plus a testimonial card on a gradient background.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for the static landing page.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollPosition.ts: Custom React hook that tracks and returns the current vertical scroll position of the window.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind layers, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the dark theme, and adds utility animations like gradient-shift and float.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom brand palette, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the app.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including existing completed features (footer cleanup, privacy policy page creation, routing) and pending new feature requests for the Live Hosting Talents web app.
